bundles.title: Define PhaseContract types and sub-types
bundles.goal: Create the canonical PhaseContract type, sub-types, and PhaseContractRegistry interface in src/contracts/phase-contract.ts

tasks.title: Define ArtifactRef, CliStep, AgentTaskSpec, GatedDecisionSpec, and PhaseNextAction sub-types
Define the unified PhaseContract interface merging routing and execution fields
Define PhaseContractRegistry interface with get() and phases() methods
Implement createPhaseContractRegistry factory function
Add unit tests verifying type shape, registry construction, and frozen readonly semantics

bundles.title: Populate PhaseContract registry for all 18 phases
bundles.goal: Build the production PhaseContractRegistry with a PhaseContract entry for every workflow state, extracting structured data from command-bodies.ts

tasks.title: Audit command-bodies.ts to identify structurable fields (CLI commands, artifact refs, gates) per phase
Extract routing fields from existing phase-router test fixtures for each phase
Define PhaseContract entries for all 18 workflow phases as const data
Wire entries into createPhaseContractRegistry and export the production registry
Add cross-check test asserting registry.phases() matches workflowStates from workflow-machine.ts

bundles.title: Implement PhaseContract to Markdown renderer
bundles.goal: Create renderPhaseMarkdown pure function that generates Markdown from structured PhaseContract fields

tasks.title: Implement renderPhaseMarkdown function rendering CLI commands as fenced code blocks
Render artifact refs as bullet lists grouped by input/output role
Render gated decisions as option blocks with advance events
Render agent task specs as structured sections
Add semantic comparison tests validating output against current command-bodies.ts structured sections

bundles.title: Migrate phase-router imports to canonical module
bundles.goal: Update all phase-router files to import PhaseContract from src/contracts/phase-contract.ts and add execution field validation

tasks.title: Convert phase-router/types.ts to re-export PhaseContract, PhaseContractRegistry, PhaseNextAction from src/contracts/phase-contract.ts
Remove local PhaseContract type definition from phase-router/types.ts
Update import paths in router.ts and other phase-router modules
Add requiredInputs/producedOutputs presence validation in assertConsistent method
Update phase-router/index.ts re-exports
Verify all existing phase-router tests pass without modification

bundles.title: Refactor command-bodies.ts to use registry and renderer
bundles.goal: Replace structurable sections in command-bodies.ts with PhaseContract registry lookups and renderPhaseMarkdown calls while preserving prose templates

tasks.title: Import PhaseContract registry and renderPhaseMarkdown into command-bodies.ts
Replace structurable sections with registry lookup + renderer calls for each applicable phase
Preserve prose template strings for non-structurable content
Add semantic equivalence tests comparing pre-refactor and post-refactor generated guides
Run full build pipeline to verify slash-command guide generation is unchanged
